'''Y'nybeth''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] located within the [[Y'nybeth system/Legends|star system]] of the same name of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the dark place and [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Plasmar]]s, transparent amoebic creatures that absorbed any available warmth into their bodies.<ref name="PT" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1stm}}
